---
title: "Alfred Rolfe"
---

## Alfred Rolfe

**Dates:** (Andover 1858/9-1918)

### Description

schoolmaster in Otterbourne

### Biography

[1891 census]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 24 [1900?]
- Letter from Sept 5th 1888
- Letter from June 22d [1888]
- Letter from Sept 10th 1882
- Letter from July 2, 1881.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
